feed.title: howtofilebankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: How to File Bankruptcy -- Bankruptcy Law Guide, Chapter 7 & 13 [2026]
entry.summary: Free how to file bankruptcy guide for 2026. Bankruptcy law explained: Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, exemptions, filing costs, means test, and step-by-step instructions.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Court Locations -- Find Your Court by State
entry.summary: Find your bankruptcy court by state and district. Complete directory of all 94 federal bankruptcy court locations with addresses and filing information.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Jurisdiction and Venue -- Where to File
entry.summary: Learn about bankruptcy jurisdiction and venue -- where to file in our free 2026 guide. Clear explanations, real data, and practical steps.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Laws -- Federal Bankruptcy Code Overview [2026]
entry.summary: Learn about bankruptcy laws -- federal bankruptcy code overview [2026] | howtofilebankruptcy.org in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: Bare Bones Bankruptcy Filing -- Emergency Filing Guide
entry.summary: How to file a bare bones bankruptcy petition in an emergency. Minimum required documents, 14-day deadline to complete, and when emergency filing makes.

entry.title: Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 -- Which Bankruptcy Should I File?
entry.summary: Quick decision guide comparing Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy. Income, assets, debt type, timeline, and goals determine which chapter is right for.

entry.title: Common Mistakes When Filing Bankruptcy (2026)
entry.summary: Learn about common mistakes when filing bankruptcy (2026) | howtofilebankruptcy.org in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: Pre-Filing Credit Counseling Requirement for Bankruptcy
entry.summary: You must complete credit counseling within 180 days before filing bankruptcy. Approved agencies, online options ($15-50), and what happens to the.

entry.title: Divorce and Bankruptcy: Which to File First [2026 Guide]
entry.summary: Learn about divorce and bankruptcy: which to file first [2026 guide] | howtofilebankruptcy.org in our free 2026 guide.

entry.title: Bankruptcy Document Checklist -- Everything You Need
entry.summary: Learn about bankruptcy document checklist -- everything you need | howtofilebankruptcy.org in our free 2026 guide.
